subcodes.first_line: A Book revealed in truth, bearing witness unto that whereunto the All-Merciful hath testified from time immemorial: that there is none other God but Him, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق و یشهد بما شهد الرحمن فی ازل الازال انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @thankfulness; gratitude, @suffering; rejection of Christ
